opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Tim mentioned tidy finishes on a job with Ellis Plumbing & Heating Services Birmingham. That stood out.
source_quote: Ish came out at short notice to repair and service an old boiler for my niece who has learning difficulties.  He ensured there was hot water and heating to all radiators and everything is working perfectly since his visit last week.  He quoted a price before the visit and that's what he charged.  Ev
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Tim)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Tim mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
